title: limonium ovalifolium var. majus
intro: Limonium ovalifolium var. majus, also known as sea lavender, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of sea lavender include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of sea lavender include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and digestive discomfort.
